title: Charging the Quartz
description:
The Charger is used to energize materials such as Charged Certus Quartz, a critical component in many AE2 recipes and machines. Early on, it can be powered manually using a Wooden Crank attached to the top. Later, the Charger can receive power directly through AE2 networks or standard FE power systems for fully automated operation.

Make a Charger and start making Charged Certus Quartz.
